common.metaDescription: Interactive platform for exploring the Romanian Constitution through all 9 historical versions (1866–2003).

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

hero.headline: Romanian
hero.subtitle: Explore Romania's fundamental law through all its historical versions:

features.sectionDescription: Everything you need to explore and understand the Romanian Constitution
features.exploreArticlesDesc: Navigate article by article through all constitutional versions, with interactive table of contents and deep linking.
features.compareVersionsDesc: Compare any two versions of the Constitution with a modern diff viewer, showing additions, deletions, and modifications.
features.graphViewDesc: Visualize the hierarchical structure and inter-article references through an interactive graph.
features.crossSearchDesc: Instantly search articles across all versions, with command palette (Ctrl+K) and highlighted preview.
features.feedbackDesc: Express your agreement or disagreement on each article and leave anonymous comments, automatically moderated by AI.

howItWorks.sectionDescription: Three simple steps to explore the fundamental law
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select one of the 9 historical versions of the Constitution, from 1866 to 2003. Navigate article by article through the interactive table of contents.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use the diff viewer to see exactly what changed between versions. Visualize the structure through the interactive graph.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Agree or disagree on each article and leave comments automatically moderated by AI for quality.

timeline.sectionDescription: Nine defining moments in Romania's constitutional history
timeline.clickForDetails: Click/hover on a year to see details
timeline.item1866Desc: Adopted on July 1, 1866, the first constitution of modern Romania. Inspired by the Belgian Constitution, it established constitutional monarchy and civil rights.
timeline.item1923Desc: Adopted on March 29, 1923, after the Great Union. It expanded universal male suffrage and consolidated the unitary state.
timeline.item1938Desc: Promulgated on February 27, 1938 by King Carol II. It concentrated power in the hands of the monarch, suspending political parties.
timeline.item1948Desc: Adopted on April 13, 1948, after the establishment of the communist regime. It transformed Romania into the People's Republic of Romania.
timeline.item1952Desc: Adopted on September 24, 1952, inspired by the Soviet model. It enshrined the leading role of the single party.
timeline.item1965Desc: Adopted on August 21, 1965, it transformed RPR into the Socialist Republic of Romania. It reflected the national-communist orientation.
timeline.item1986Desc: Republished in 1986, the final version of the socialist constitution. It reflected centralization of power and the cult of personality.
timeline.item1991Desc: Adopted by referendum on December 8, 1991. The first democratic constitution, with separation of powers and fundamental rights.
timeline.item2003Desc: Revised by referendum on October 18-19, 2003. Brought changes for EU and NATO integration.

stats.sectionDescription: Real data extracted from all nine versions of the Constitution

faq.sectionDescription: Answers to the most common questions about the platform
faq.q1: What versions of the Constitution are available?
faq.a1: The platform includes all 9 historical versions of the Romanian Constitution: 1866, 1923, 1938, 1948, 1952, 1965, 1986, 1991, and 2003. Each version can be explored article by article, with hierarchical navigation through titles, chapters, and sections.
faq.q2: How can I compare two versions of the Constitution?
faq.a2: Navigate to the "Compare Versions" section in the main menu. Select version A (left) and version B (right), and the diff viewer will show you exactly which articles were added, removed, or modified, with distinct colors for each type of change.
faq.a3: Yes, all comments are completely anonymous. No user account is required. Comments go through an automatic AI-based moderation system that checks quality and compliance with civilized expression norms.
faq.a4: Press Ctrl+K (or ⌘K on Mac) to open the search palette. You can search by article number, title, or content. Results are grouped by version, so you can see how a topic appears in each version of the Constitution.
faq.q5: What does the graph visualization represent?
faq.a5: The interactive graph shows the hierarchical structure of the Constitution (titles → chapters → sections → articles) and references between articles. Nodes are colored differently by type, and you can click any node to see details or navigate to the respective article.
faq.q6: Can I export comparisons in PDF format?
faq.a6: Yes, on the comparison page there is a PDF export button that generates a styled document with the differences between the two selected versions, including color codes for additions, deletions, and modifications.

cta.title: Ready to explore the fundamental law?
cta.description: Navigate through all versions of the Romanian Constitution, compare changes, and discover the evolution of your rights.

footer.description: Interactive platform for exploring all versions of the Romanian Constitution.
footer.aboutText: Open source project for making the Romanian Constitution accessible. Data comes directly from the official texts of all 9 constitutions (1866–2003).
